# fastly_service_compute_package_upload (Action)

Uploads or replaces a Compute package on a specific Fastly service version. Intended for explicit/default workflows; not for use with automatic versioned service resources.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_id` (String) Fastly Compute service ID.
- `version` (Number) Writable Fastly service version to modify.

### Optional

- `content` (String) The contents of the Compute deployment package as a base64-encoded string. Conflicts with `filename`.
- `filename` (String) The path to the Compute deployment package on the local filesystem. Conflicts with `content`.
